doc.field: Correspondence from the island of Réunion (Île de Bourbon), plus one letter from Emily Ruete (Princess Salme of Zanzibar)
Correspondence from the island of Réunion (Île de Bourbon), plus one letter from Emily Ruete (Princess Salme of Zanzibar)
Correspondence from the island of Réunion (Île de Bourbon), plus one letter from Emily Ruete (Princess Salme of Zanzibar)

Ruete, Emily, formerly Princess Salme of Zanzibar, letter written on letterhead with Arabic monogram, Dresden, 2 leaves, ALS; and description of contents of letter by autograph collector Hildegard Spitzenberg, Berlin (1 leaf, ALS), and one additional letter (1 leaf, ALS) with description, plus undated news clippings

Ruete, Emily, formerly Princess Salme of Zanzibar, letter written on letterhead with Arabic monogram, Dresden, 2 leaves, ALS; and description of contents of letter by autograph collector Hildegard Spitzenberg, Berlin (1 leaf, ALS), and one additional letter (1 leaf, ALS) with description, plus undated news clippings

Ruete, Emily, formerly Princess Salme of Zanzibar, letter written on letterhead with Arabic monogram, Dresden, 2 leaves, ALS; and description of contents of letter by autograph collector Hildegard Spitzenberg, Berlin (1 leaf, ALS), and one additional letter (1 leaf, ALS) with description, plus undated news clippings

Ruete, Emily, formerly Princess Salme of Zanzibar, letter written on letterhead with Arabic monogram, Dresden, 2 leaves, ALS; and description of contents of letter by autograph collector Hildegard Spitzenberg, Berlin (1 leaf, ALS), and one additional letter (1 leaf, ALS) with description, plus undated news clippings
